metadata.title: Fractal Dimension: Between Curve and Plane

beats.narration_text: Talofa. A learner asks: build me an interactive simulation of fractal dimension: between curve and plane. One Claude prompt. Here is what comes back.

props.command: build me an interactive sim of fractal dimension: between curve and plane
output: ✓ Fractal Dimension: Between Curve and Plane

beats.narration_text: Fractal Dimension: Between Curve and Plane is one of those ideas that is easier to see than to state. The Sierpinski triangle has dimension 1.585 — too jagged to be a curve, too sparse to fill a plane.. This simulation makes that visible — and every educator can build one.
beats.new_visual_element: Concept card: Fractal Dimension: Between Curve and Plane

beats.narration_text: Here is the prompt. One message to Claude.
beats.code_snippet: Build a single-file interactive HTML simulation of Fractal Dimension: Between Curve and Plane. Use D3.js from CDN. All physics computed in-browser JavaScript. Sliders for: N (copies), s (scale). Verify: The Sierpinski triangle has dimension 1.585 — too jagged to be a curve, too sparse to fill a plane.. Palette: background #FFFFFF, ink #2A1A0E, accent #C8102E.

props.command: Build a single-file interactive HTML simulation of Fractal Dimension: Between Curve and Plane. Use D3.js from CDN. All physics computed in-browser JavaScript. Sliders for: N (copies), s (scale). Verif

beats.narration_text: Claude returns a single-file HTML. Here is the heart of it — the integrator and the slider handler. No server. No build step. One file, everything in the browser.
beats.code_snippet: // Fractal Dimension: Between Curve and Plane — core physics
beats.new_visual_element: Onda code-block: core JS (integrator + slider handler)
beats.prompt: Show the core physics loop from fractal-dimension-explore.html

beats.narration_text: At the default settings: fractal dimension: between curve and plane. Watch what the simulation shows.
Now drag N (copies) from 2 to 9. Watch the physics respond in real time.
beats.new_visual_element: Slate: narrate slider sweep of N (copies) from 2 to 9

beats.narration_text: The Sierpinski triangle has dimension 1.585 — too jagged to be a curve, too sparse to fill a plane.. Exactly as the equations predict.

One prompt. A live demonstration of fractal dimension: between curve and plane. For educators: every concept in your course can have one of these. Claude builds it; you judge it; your students explore it.
Open this file in your browser and drag the controls. Or ask Claude to add a second parameter, change the palette, or explain the physics step by step alongside the simulation.
Take this prompt, run it on your own topic. Your turn.
beats.code_snippet: Take this Fractal Dimension: Between Curve and Plane simulation and add a second slider that controls N (copies). Show how changing it reveals a new aspect of the physics. Keep the single-file format and D3 CDN.

props.command: Take this Fractal Dimension: Between Curve and Plane simulation and add a second slider that controls N (copies). Show how changing it reveals a new aspect of the physics. Keep the single-file format

beats.narration_text: Fractal Dimension: Between Curve and Plane. Medhavy.
